title: BRAVESHINE Keychain with Snap Hook Carabiner Clips, Paracord Keychain Carabiner Clips with Locking D Ring Hooks Hangers, Heavy Duty Lanyard Key Chain for Car Keys, Backpack, Tools, Men, Women
features: Multi-functional and Practical: Variety of uses for you in indoor or outdoor. It can be used to hang your clothes, water bottles, handbag or backpack, keys, car keys, knife, shopping bags, flashlight, id card holder, USB driver, umbrella, toiletry bags, key tags, emergency fire starters, survival gear, waterproof bag, luggage, keychain organizer, keychain holder, keychain gadget and multitool. Attaches extra belongings to any bag.

SIMPLE and EASY USE: The two d-shaped carabiner clip, you can easily connect to your backpack, quick release it and perfect for keep small items in an easy-to-get-to place. It is easy to fasten hang. you can use it with the clip on belt buckles, lanyards, backpacks and other portable bags; Customers tell us they have also used these hooks in cars, on bicycles, wheelchairs, walking frames, shopping trolleys, with dog leads and more!
High quality: This key chain is made of military grade braided nylon paracord, with metal carabiner, Pack of 2 paracord lanyard design, hand-free, Can disassemble to 2m length.

Compact Collection: Survivals keychain ring hook is convenient and compact for you to hook it to the bags, belts or put it into your pocket, car, survivals tool box. You can easily take the parachute cord carabiner keychain to anywhere at anytime.
After service: If for any reason you are not happy with our paracord keychain carabiner clips, we will solve your problem in time.
description: Product Description Versatile Paracord Carabiner-Make Your Hands Free Wide Application These Special Carabiners can be used in Cars,Pushchair, Wheeled Luggage, Backpack, Bicycles, Wheelchairs, Walking Frames, Shopping Trolleys for hooping sports bottle, keys, shopping bags,coats, toys,groceries,handbags,luggage, and small tools etc Can be used in playground When you play in the playground, no longer worry about your backpack, cup, racket placed on the ground and stepped on by others, or confused with someone else's things. Bring convenience to you Allow you to connect smaller luggage to wheeled luggage, bring convenience to you when you travel or have a trip, no need to carry your smaller bags or luggage with your hands. Release your hands Like having an extra pair of helping hands, the organizer hooks attach on your stroller and can carry for you all the shopping bags, purses, clothes or groceries Space Saving The carabiner hook helps to hang clothes, handbags, umbrellas, water bottles, and so on. Save seat space and prevent bags falling off when turning.Organizes back seat clutter and opens up seat, floor and leg room. High Quality Strong 7 strands paracord, heavy duty metal ring and carabiner. Four Using Ways It can hang small things, not so bulky. Both hooks can hang heavy things.Double force, Great Strength. Convenient Carry Easily hang it on your bag, pants, survival kit, belt loop and any place where there is a buckle and never lost.
